title: ConvSim Safety Policy
description: Validates a safety policy file that governs content boundaries for a scenario.

content_categories.description: Explicit allow/block rules per content category. Non-negotiable categories (nsfw_sexual, real_person_impersonation, instructional_criminal, crisis_content) must be declared.

nsfw_sexual.description: NSFW sexual content must always be blocked.

real_person_impersonation.description: Real-person impersonation must always be blocked.

instructional_criminal.description: Instructional criminal content must always be blocked.

crisis_content.description: Crisis content must be redirected to real resources, not simulated.

redirect_message.description: What the NPC says when redirecting away from blocked content.

allow_profanity.description: Whether mild profanity is allowed in the NPC's dialogue.

content_rating_cap.description: Maximum content rating this policy permits.
